title: Cortex: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Cortex turns scattered notes, tasks and tabs into one focused workspace, so your best ideas never slip away.
Cortex pulls thinking, planning and doing into a single flow that keeps up with your brain.
cards: Drop a thought anywhere and Cortex files it where it belongs.
Open one clean view and start the moment you sit down.
Connect ideas across pages so context follows you everywhere.
See where your hours actually go and reclaim the wasted ones.
Your notes stay yours, encrypted with fine-grained access.
Let Cortex draft, summarize and tidy up the busywork for you.

sections.text: Jot a quick note, paste a link or talk it out, and Cortex sorts it into the right place without breaking your flow.
bullets: Voice notes turned into clean text

sections.text: No more juggling ten tabs. Today's tasks, notes and goals sit in one quiet view built for deep work.

sections.sub: No setup marathon, no manual required.
steps: Sign up and shape your workspace in under a minute.
Bring in notes and tasks or start from a clean slate.
Let Cortex surface what matters and get into deep work.

sections.quote: Cortex replaced my notes app, my to-do list and three sticky notes on my monitor. I finally trust that nothing falls through the cracks.
sections.author: Sample Person

sections.sub: Start free. Upgrade when you are ready for more.

items: Is the free plan really free?
Yes. The Solo plan is free forever with unlimited notes, no card required.
Can I import my existing notes?
You can bring notes in from common apps or a plain file, and Cortex organizes them for you.
Cortex uses AI to draft, summarize and tidy notes on request. You stay in control of every change.
Your notes are encrypted in transit and at rest, with access controls on paid plans.
Yes. Capture and review on phone, tablet or desktop, and everything stays in sync.

sections.sub: Join thousands of makers who swapped scattered tabs for one focused space.

sections.tagline: One focused workspace for notes, tasks and ideas. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Cortex is a sample template with dummy content
